nasb.text: Othniel the son of Kenaz, Caleb’s younger brother, captured it; so he gave him his daughter Achsah for a wife.

esv.text: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, Caleb’s younger brother, captured it. And he gave him Achsah his daughter for a wife.

cnv.text: 迦勒的弟弟基納斯的兒子俄陀聶攻取了那城，迦勒就把自己的女兒押撒給他作妻子。

ccb.text: 迦勒的兄弟基纳斯的儿子俄陀聂攻取了那城，迦勒便把女儿押撒嫁给他。
